pre_game.message: Hi F, I’m C — nice to meet you. Are you feeling nervous about the game, or do you already have a strategy in mind?
A bit nervous, but mostly focused — I plan to build trust early, read people, and stay adaptable. What about you?
Same here — I’m determined to win for the people I care about. I’ll cooperate early to build trust, watch actions more than words, and adapt as the game unfolds. Want to team up at the start?
Sure — let's team up early. We'll cooperate first, watch actions not just words, and regroup after round one to decide next moves. Sound good?
Sounds great — let's cooperate early, watch actions not words, and regroup right after round one to decide next moves.
Perfect — agreed. I’ll cooperate early, watch actions, and meet you right after round one to compare notes and plan next steps.
Thanks — looking forward to it. Let’s stick to the plan, watch for inconsistencies, and meet right after round one to compare notes.
Absolutely — sticking to the plan. I’ll watch for anyone who flips or acts differently than they talk. See you after round one.
Sounds good — I’ll watch for flips and inconsistencies too; let’s meet by the common table right after round one to compare notes.
Great — I’ll be at the common table right after round one; let’s compare notes and call out any flips.
I’ll be there — see you at the common table; we’ll call out any flips.
Sounds like a plan — see you at the common table; we'll call out any flips and compare notes.
I'll be there — let’s stick to the plan, watch closely, and call out any flips; see you at the common table.
Sounds good — see you at the common table; we'll stick to the plan and call out any flips.
Sounds good — I'll be there; let's watch who actually cooperates and call out any flips.
I'll be watching too — we'll call out any flips and compare notes at the common table right after round one.
Sounds good — I’ll be there; we’ll call out flips and compare notes. Trust your reads; see you at the common table.
Sounds good — I’ll trust my reads, watch for flips, and compare notes at the common table right after round one; see you there.
I’ll be there—sticking to our plan. Let’s call out any flips, compare notes right after round one, and adjust from there; see you at the common table.
I'll be there—sticking to the plan. We'll call out flips, compare notes after round one, and adjust as needed. See you at the table.
Sounds good — see you at the table; sticking to the plan and we'll call out any flips.
